title: Pink 1st Birthday Photo Banner for Baby Girls - 1-12 Month Milestone Decorations, Bunting Garland for First Birthday Party and Anniversary Celebration
features: [First Birthday Photo Banner] Celebrate Your Baby's First Birthday with this Special Photo Banner, which Includes 12 Card Papers and a 3-Meter Rope. Each Card Represents a Month, Showcasing the Growth and Milestones of Your Child From January to December. This Banner Adds a Memorable Touch to the Birthday Celebration.

[Perfect Baby Party Decoration] Personalize the Banner by Attaching the Most Special Photos of Your Baby's Growth. It Creates a Joyful Atmosphere During the Anniversary Birthday Party, Allowing Everyone to Appreciate the Journey of Your Baby's Growth. It Serves as a Meaningful Keepsake to Capture the Changes Throughout the Year.

[High Quality] Made from Reliable Kraft Paper, this Baby Birthday Banner Is Security for Use. Hang It on the Wall and Display Your Baby's Photos to Create a Charming Decoration. It Can Be Used Not Only for the Anniversary Party But Also as Daily Decor to Commemorate Your Baby's Growth.

[Easy To Use] Select 12 of the Most Cherished Baby Growth Photos and Attach Them to the Cards. The Paper Cards Feature Two Holes for Easy Stringing with the Included 3-Meter Rope. The Solid Color Background of the Cards Beautifully Highlights the Photos, Showcasing Your Baby's Journey of Growth and Joy.

[Perfect Gift] Commemorating The Baby's Anniversary Party Holds Great Significance, and This 1-12 Month Photo Banner Makes an Ideal Decoration and Gift. It Allows Everyone to Share In the Joy of Accompanying the Baby's Growth.
description: Features: Celebrate Your Baby's First Birthday with a Special Photo Banner Featuring 12 Card Papers and a 3-Meter Rope, Showcasing Their Growth from January to December and Adding a Memorable Touch to the Celebration. Personalize the Banner by Attaching Special Photos of Your Baby's Growth, Creating a Joyful Atmosphere and Serving As a Meaningful Keepsake to Capture the Changes Throughout the Year. Made from Durable Kraft Paper, this High-Quality Baby Birthday Banner Is Suitable for Both the Anniversary Party and Daily Decoration to Commemorate Your Baby's Growth. It Is Easy to Use, with Two Holes for Stringing the Photos and a Solid Color Background that Beautifully Highlights the Journey of Growth and Joy. Specifications: Material: Paper Color: ‎Pink Size: 17.5x13.5cm Shape: Rectangular Packing List: 1-12 Month Birthday Photo Banner for Baby.
